schedule.session: AnimalClue: Recognizing Animals by their Traces (ICCV 2025 Highlight)
Do computer vision foundation models learn the low-level characteristics of the human visual system?
RL-GSBridge: 3D Gaussian Splatting Based Real2Sim2Real Method for Robotic Manipulation Learning (ICRA 2025)
ActionReasoning: Robot Action Reasoning in 3D Space with LLM for Robotic Brick Stacking

oralPresentation.title: Oral Presentation Guidelines
oralPresentation.content: Each oral presentation will be allocated 15 minutes, followed by 5 minutes for questions and answers.
guidelines: Upload your presentation at least 30 minutes before your session
Include your paper title, authors, and affiliations on the first slide
A timer will be visible to help you manage your time

posterPresentation.title: Poster Presentation Guidelines
posterPresentation.content: Posters will be displayed during the dedicated poster session. At least one author must be present during this time.
guidelines: Set up your poster 30 minutes before the session starts
Prepare a 2-minute elevator pitch for your work
Consider bringing handouts or QR codes linking to your paper/code

technicalRequirements.title: Technical Requirements
technicalRequirements.content: The following equipment will be provided for oral presentations:
technicalRequirements.note: Please bring your own laptop or a USB drive with your presentation.
